text: My water heater stopped making hot water this morning, only cold comes out of the tap. It is a gas unit about ten years old.
A pipe burst in my basement and water is flooding everywhere, I cannot find the main shutoff valve, please help right now.
The AC is running outside but it is blowing warm air inside and not cooling the house at all, it is over a hundred degrees.
Our furnace will not turn on and there is no heat, it is below freezing outside and we have a newborn in the house.
The breaker in my garage keeps tripping every time I plug in the space heater, I have to keep resetting the panel.
I smell gas near the water heater and it smells like rotten eggs, should I leave the house and call the gas company?
The kitchen sink drains really slowly and gurgles, and now it is completely clogged and backing up with dirty water.
The thermostat screen is blank and the whole system is dead, I changed the batteries but it still will not turn on.
An outlet in the kitchen is sparking and there are black scorch marks around it, it smells like burning plastic.
My sump pump failed during the storm and the basement is filling with water fast, the pit is overflowing.
The toilet keeps running constantly and the water will not stop filling the tank, I think the flapper is bad.
I want a quote to install a ductless mini split heat pump in my bedroom, we have never had air conditioning before.
I need to upgrade my electrical panel from a hundred amp to two hundred amp service for an EV charger.
The pipes froze overnight and now no water comes out of any faucet, I am worried a pipe might burst when it thaws.
The garbage disposal is jammed and just hums when I turn it on, it will not spin and there is standing water in the sink.
My swamp cooler is not cooling well, I think the pads are dried out and need to be replaced before the monsoon heat.
There is water leaking from the bottom of the water heater and a puddle is forming in the closet, the tank is rusty.
The lights in my living room keep flickering and dimming, especially when the refrigerator or the AC kicks on.
I would like to schedule duct cleaning and an AC tune up before summer, the vents are dusty and airflow is weak.
I want to install a whole house standby generator with an automatic transfer switch in case of power outages.
